name: Emergency Investigator Badge
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3 Deployed Identity]

When this unit takes lethal damage, their HP does not drop below 1, instantly heals 80% of their max HP, and recovers from Stagger. (once per Encounter, rounded up)
When the E.G.O Gift activates, starting next turn, gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [Vulnerable] at every Turn Start for this Encounter.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, gain 1 additional [TimeRentalTwoPersonality] when gaining a Stack of it.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, if the target has [TimeSuspend], deal +10% damage with Attack Skills.

[Effects apply only to #2 and #3 Deployed Identities]

When this unit takes lethal damage, their HP does not drop below 1, instantly heals 80% of their max HP, and recovers from Stagger. (once per Encounter, rounded up)
When the E.G.O Gift activates, starting next turn, gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [Vulnerable] at every Turn Start for this Encounter.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, gain 1 additional [TimeRentalTwoPersonality] when gaining a Stack of it.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, if the target has [TimeSuspend], deal +12.5% damage with Attack Skills.

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

When this unit takes lethal damage, their HP does not drop below 1, instantly heals 80% of their max HP, and recovers from Stagger. (once per Encounter, rounded up)
When the E.G.O Gift activates, starting next turn, gain 2 [Enhancement] at every Turn Start for this Encounter.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, gain 2 additional [TimeRentalTwoPersonality] when gaining a Stack of it.
If the affected unit is a T Corp. employee, if the target has [TimeSuspend], deal +15% damage with Attack Skills.
